title: We'll Be Back Soon!
description: Our platform is currently undergoing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your patience.

whatsHappening.title: What's Happening?
whatsHappening.description: We're performing system upgrades and improvements to serve you better.

whenBack.title: When We'll Be Back
whenBack.description: We expect to be back online shortly. Please check back in a few moments.

needHelp.title: Need Help?
needHelp.description: For urgent matters, please contact our support team via email.

footer: Thank you for your understanding and continued support!

notification.title: Maintenance Mode Activated
notification.description: The system will enter maintenance mode in {seconds} seconds. Please save your work.
notification.deactivatedDescription: The system is now back online. You can continue using the platform.
